name: Port & Co Fan Favorite Tee
description: Cost-effective option, designed for softness and durability, and for sports enthusiasts.

name: Gildan Softstyle T-Shirt
description: A soft, lightweight t-shirt with a basic fit. It's a great choice for those looking for a comfortable option.

name: Port & Co Core Cotton Tee
description: An indispensable midweight t-shirt in our classic silhouette—with a large color range and very friendly price. It's a go-to choice for everyday wear.

name: Port & Co Essential Tee
description: A year-round essential, our best-selling t-shirt has been voted most popular by groups, teams, clubs and schools across America.

name: Next Level Apparel Adult CVC Tee
description: Known for its soft, lightweight, and durable material

name: Staple Tee
description: Enduring comfort in a mid-weight regular fit. Featuring neck ribbing, side seams, and double needle hems for durability and minimal shrinkage, it's a timeless choice for comfort and style. Built to last.

name: Garment Dyed Crewneck
description: textile is durable, comfortable, and virtually shrink-free. Color will stay true even after repeated washings. It also gives a broken-in feel, just like your favorite T-shirt that's been worn for a decade. Meticulously designed with a high-ribbed collar that provides a snug, comfortable fit that will not stretch out or lose its shape over time. Cut with a spacious fit in the sleeves and torso, making it relaxed and versatile enough to wear with anything

name: Sport-Tek PosiCharge Competitor Tee
description: Lightweight, roomy and highly breathable, these moisture-wicking, value-priced tees feature PosiCharge technology to lock in color and prevent logos from fading.

name: Gildan Heavy Blend Hooded Sweatshirt
description: The Heavy Blend collection is now made with finer yarns and new MVS Air spinning technology, which improves the fabric by reducing pilling, enhancing durability and creating a smoother printing surface.

name: Gildan Softstyle Midweight Pullover Hooded Sweatshirt
description: Hoodie designed for a soft, premium feel at a budget-friendly price

name: District V.I.T. Heavyweight Fleece Hoodie
description: These old-school options are oversized, durable and versatile

name: Heavy Fleece Hood
description: This hoodie is incredibly soft and warm, yet still breathable and moisture-wicking. The loose fit allows for a full range of motion, making it perfect for everything from running errands to lounging around the house. The kangaroo pocket provides ample storage for your essentials, while the ribbed cuffs and hem keep the cold out.

name: Port Authority Brushed Twill Low Profile Cap
description: The great classic look and lightweight feel make this cap an all-around favorite.

name: Richardson Trucker Cap
description: The standard by which all trucker caps are measured. Popular for its undeniable quality and versatility, this casual classic is constructed with the trademark attention to detail Richardson is known for.

attributes.material: 60/40 cotton/polyester front with 100% polyester mesh back

name: Richardson Laser Perf R-Flex Snapback
description: A performance version of a classic six-panel baseball cap, this cap has a laser-perforated body for maximum airflow and a Stay-Dri sweatband to keep players dry.

name: OTTO CAP 5 Panel Mid Profile Baseball Cap
description: Durable, structured cap designed for versatility, featuring a seamless, firm front panel ideal for custom embroidery

attributes.material: 65% Polyester/35% Cotton. Structured Firm Front Panel
